resources.string: Power:HR drift between first and second half of moving time (Pa:Hr).
Trend of Pa:Hr drift over time — sparkline plus 20-min delta.
Anaerobic capacity remaining as a percentage (Skiba W\' balance). Colored by status.
Anaerobic work capacity remaining in kilojoules (Skiba W\' balance).
Anaerobic capacity status: FRESH / GOOD / WORKING / DEPLETING / CRITICAL / EMPTY.
Time to empty (above CP) or to full recovery (below CP).
Net W\' depletion/recovery rate in watts (− depleting, + recovering).
